jobs.title: AE - Attentive
jobs.jobDescription:
Company: Attentive.ai 
https://attentive.ai 
Designation: Account Executive (AE) 
Experience: 2+ years as an AE   
Location – Remote 
Timings – US timings (4.30/5.30 PM – 1.30/2.30 AM) 
If interested, please share CV at ankit.garg@kompatibleminds.com or apply at - Account Executive 
(AE) - Kompatible Minds | 
About - Leading provider of landscape and property management software powered by cutting-edge 
Artificial Intelligence (AI) using Aerial view analytics. Its software is designed to optimize workflows and 
help businesses scale up effortlessly in the outdoor services industry. 
Its software caters to landscaping, snow removal, paving maintenance, and facilities maintenance 
businesses, while another software product provides end-to-end solutions for all commercial landscape 
maintenance and construction jobs through automated workflows. Trusted by top US and Canadian 
sales teams, it is proudly supported by renowned investors, including Sequoia Surge, InfoEdge Ventures, 
Vertex Ventures, Tenacity Ventures & Insight Partner 
Job Description  
The ideal candidate is an energetic self-starter with the ability to identify influencers and key decision 
makers within accounts and effectively engage with US based customers. The candidate will proactively 
nurture leads by responding to inbound interests and targeted outbound prospects, will qualify for leads 
based on pre-set criteria and will set up meetings with qualified customers, and then take them to 
closure.. 
Responsibilities  
 Develop and execute a sales strategy to identify and close new customers. 
 Build and manage a sales pipeline, tracking leads and opportunities through each stage of the sales 
process. 
 Develop and maintain relationships with key decision-makers in target accounts, using consultative 
selling techniques to understand their business needs and how our platform can help them achieve 
their goals. 
 Negotiate and close deals with customers, ensuring that the terms of each deal are favorable for both 
the customer and Attentive.ai 
 Collaborate with our product and marketing teams to ensure that our offerings meet the needs of our 
customers and are well-positioned in the market. 
 Maintain a strong understanding of our offering and the construction industry, and stay up-to-date on 
industry trends and best practices. 
Requirements For The Role 
 2+ Years relevant experience in selling B2B software/SaaS products. 
  
Experience in North American markets preferred 
 Experience in SaaS AE roles will be preferred 
 Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with fluent American English 
 Ability to multitask, organize, and prioritize work
jobs.mustHaveSkills: 1.8+ years experience into B2B Saas sales as an AE
jobs.redFlags:
Current company experience not less than 1.5 years
No measurable achievement in CV
jobs.standardQuestions:
What are your products you pitch in the current company 
Any other major products you pitched in the previous organisations 
What are your sales quota and target achieved (any of monthly / quarterly / yearly and this period must be defined) 
What is your avg deal size in dollars 
How many closures in numbers you did in the same duration
jobs.jdShortcuts:

  "/AEJD": "Hello Prateek,

As discussed earlier - We are currently looking for Account Executive to join Attentive.ai. 

Attentive.ai is your go-to partner for AI-based takeoffs, transforming how construction and field services professionals work.

https://attentive.ai

Location - Remote

PFA the indicative JD &  confirm your interest for the same if interested.

You can also apply via our website: https://kompatibleminds.com/job/account-executive-ae/

Thanks and regards,
Nike Disoza
Recruitment Manager 
Kompatible Minds
LinkedIn ||9113067450",
  "/AEL": "Hello 
This is Ankit Garg from Kompatible Minds. - A Talent Acquisition company 
We are currently looking for an Account Executive to join with one of our clients. If interested, please connect"
}

jobs.title: Livlong: Area Manager - Corporate Sales
jobs.jobDescription:
Livlong 365 is a leading Health-Tech company dedicated to building a seamless and comprehensive
healthcare ecosystem. From Insurance to OPD Wellness to a robust Marketplace for top-rated
Doctors and Specialists, we offer a full spectrum of healthcare solutions.
Our services include doctor consultations, lab tests, health plans, OPD packages, home care,
elderly care, medicines and more. Parallelly, we are into distribution of health & general insurance
products across retail as well as corporate segments, with a strong presence across various
channels such as: Bancassurance, Agency, Corporate & VRM, Partnerships and Digital.

Roles: 
1. Achieve / Exceed the sales targets assigned 
2 . Drive employee adoption for the health care  
programs in the corporates signed up with
The company
3 . Deliver the results on product mix across OPD,  
AHC & EAP categories
4 . Identify and realize the new opportunities /  
segments
5 . Build the relationships with potential partners  
like Insurance Brokers, TPA,  
etc., and engage with  
them to scale up business
6.  Accountable for customer experience in the  
corporates engaged
7 . Accountable for P&L at the customer level
jobs.standardQuestions:
How much experinec you carry in Corporate Sales for products like - Mediclaim, GMC, GPA, Health Insurance, Employee benefits, OPD plans etc. 
What is your major product you pitch
jobs.jdShortcuts:
{
  "/LIVAM": "Hello Shailesh

Greetings !!

As discussed we are looking for the role of   Area Manager ( Corporate Sales )  for Livlong ( a health tech company) , a corporate business vertical promoted by IIFL ( India Infoline ) , a leading financial services company.

Website          :  https://livlong.com/

Linkedin          : https://www.linkedin.com/company/livlong365/

 Location         : Gurugram

Please find the attached JD .

Thanks and regards"
}

The CV does not show measurable sales achievements or specific SaaS product experience, which is critical for this SaaS AE role.

questionAnswerPairs.question: Location
questionAnswerPairs.why: Core JD screening question defined by the lead recruiter.
questionAnswerPairs.whatToListenFor: Score the answer against your team benchmark.

questionAnswerPairs.question: Could you explain your direct experience selling SaaS products, specifically in roles like your current Enterprise Account Executive position at OneOrigin?
questionAnswerPairs.why: The role requires 1.8+ years of B2B SaaS AE experience, which is not clearly demonstrated in the CV.
questionAnswerPairs.whatToListenFor: Specific SaaS product sales experience, sales cycle details, and customer engagement in a SaaS environment.

questionAnswerPairs.question: Can you share measurable sales achievements or quota attainment details from your current role at OneOrigin or previous sales positions?
questionAnswerPairs.why: The CV lacks quantifiable metrics or sales targets met to evidence strong sales performance.
questionAnswerPairs.whatToListenFor: Specific revenue numbers, quota attainment percentages, new client acquisition metrics, or pipeline growth statistics.
